---
name: "Feature request"
about: Suggest an enhancement for learning, UX, accessibility, or content
labels: enhancement
---

## Goal
What should be added or improved?

## Why this matters
How does this help kids/parents (learning, accessibility, retention, calmness, etc.)?

## User Story
As a parent/child, I want ..., so that ...

## Proposal
Describe your idea:

## Scope
- [ ] Small (1-2 files)
- [ ] Medium (single feature area)
- [ ] Large (cross-cutting)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Risks / Tradeoffs
Any concerns about complexity, performance, or child experience?
